_meta.intended_audience: Agents and tooling that need to load EduAgent's architecture in a single fetch without re-reading the full living doc.

field_docs.project.stack[]: Runtime / framework / DB / library names that materially affect how code is structured.
field_docs.project.entry_points: Files an agent should open first to bootstrap understanding.
field_docs.topology.nodes[].tier: Logical lane in the topology diagram; one of browser, server, upstream, store.
field_docs.topology.edges[].endpoint: URL path or upstream identifier carrying this edge.
field_docs.modules[].category: infra | voice | agent | audio | lesson_ui | scene_ui | ui_atom | course_data | api_route | db | hook | lib_util | worklet | type | script
field_docs.modules[].critical: If true, this is on the hot path for voice latency or correctness; touching it requires architecture.md sync.
field_docs.state_machines.*.states[].is_terminal: true if the FSM exits here without further transitions
field_docs.data_flows[].steps[].actor: Which node from topology.nodes is acting in this step.
field_docs.design_decisions[].category: performance | reliability | simplicity | safety | ux | scope

project.name: EduAgent
project.tagline: Children's English teaching Agent with streaming voice + canvas interaction.
project.guiding_principle: At single-user stage, prefer authoring more lessons over refactoring architecture. Only invest in architecture when a small change directly unblocks the learning loop.
stack: Next.js 14 (App Router) on a custom Node server
tsx (dev/start runner — Next dev does not handle WS upgrade)

constraints.rule: Doubao / MiMo credentials never carry NEXT_PUBLIC_ prefix; any such PR is a hard reject.
constraints.rationale: Server-only secret boundary; client must not reach upstream APIs directly.

constraints.rule: Single interaction is push-to-talk via spacebar; no long/short press distinction; no barge-in while speaking.
constraints.rationale: Simpler than canceling inflight PCM mid-flight; product can ship without barge-in.

constraints.rule: TTS WebSocket is reused across sessions; ASR opens a fresh upstream session per turn.
constraints.rationale: TTS handshake costs ~3.7s, so amortize it; ASR sessions are short-lived and per-utterance by protocol.

constraints.rule: VOICE_MOCK=true bypasses Doubao + MiMo entirely so the full pipeline works offline / in CI.
constraints.rationale: Local dev and CI cannot depend on upstream availability.

constraints.rule: If a change affects module responsibility, data flow, protocol adapter, state machine, or perf decision, the same commit must update docs/architecture.md.
constraints.rationale: Living doc only stays accurate when sync is part of the change, not a follow-up task.

constraints.rule: Real credentials must never appear in README / spec / plan / CLAUDE.md / architecture / TODO / benchmarks / commit / PR. Only placeholders.
constraints.rationale: Even private repos can leak via mirrors; rotation cost dwarfs care cost.

env_vars.name: DOUBAO_ACCESS_KEY
env_vars.purpose: Shared access key for ASR + TTS

env_vars.name: VOICE_MOCK
env_vars.purpose: When 'true', short-circuits voice stack to mocks for offline dev / CI

topology.description: Three lanes: browser hosts the user-facing pipeline; the custom Next.js server brokers WebSockets and SSE; upstream are the Doubao + MiMo + local SQLite services.

nodes.label: AudioWorklet pcm-recorder
nodes.detail: 16kHz Float32 → Int16, 200ms chunks, flushes remainder on disconnect

nodes.label: Recorder + HoldToTalk
nodes.detail: Singleton AudioContext + worklet; prewarmRecorder runs at startLesson

nodes.label: AsrClient
nodes.detail: Per-turn WebSocket; emits partial/final; sends {type:'finish'} control frame

nodes.label: PcmPlayer
nodes.detail: 24kHz queued PCM playback; stop() silences immediately

nodes.label: LessonController
nodes.detail: 8-state FSM orchestrating ASR + SSE + TTS + static quiz TTS

nodes.label: PhasedLessonController
nodes.detail: Outer phase FSM (intro / interactive / reinforcement / done) wrapping LessonController

nodes.label: PhasedLessonView UI
nodes.detail: React surface; routes phase → IntroFrame | LessonMandalaV2 | ReinforcementFlow | DoneCelebrateFrame

nodes.label: server.ts
nodes.detail: Custom Next.js server; routes WS upgrade for /api/voice/asr and /api/voice/tts

nodes.label: ASR proxy
nodes.detail: Per-turn upstream session; buffers PCM during handshake; injects targetWords hotwords

nodes.label: TTS proxy
nodes.detail: Long-conn reuse; one StartConnection per WS, many sessions

nodes.label: /api/chat (SSE)
nodes.detail: Orchestrator + SpeechExtractor + show_card normalization; emits speech-delta / actions / done

nodes.label: /api/courses /progress /sessions /stats
nodes.detail: Read-only aggregation endpoints for home / journal / parents

nodes.label: Doubao streaming ASR
nodes.detail: bigmodel_async; V3 binary; show_utterances + result_type=full + enable_ddc=false

nodes.label: Doubao streaming TTS
nodes.detail: seed-tts-2.0 + Tina老师2.0; bidirectional; codec flag locked to 0x04

modules.role: Custom Next.js server; routes WS upgrade for ASR / TTS, delegates HTTP to Next.
Startup env validation (DOUBAO_*, MIMO_*); skipped when VOICE_MOCK=true.
Structured logging shim used across server modules.
Doubao binary protocol encode/decode shared by ASR + TTS.
Server-side ASR WS proxy: PCM buffer during handshake, finish cache, hotword injection from current/next card window.
Server-side TTS WS proxy with long-connection reuse (one StartConnection, many sessions).
Browser ASR WS wrapper; finish() control-frame so upstream final lands before close.
Browser TTS WS wrapper; forwards startSession / text-chunk / finishSession / cancel.
Browser orchestrator — 8-state FSM that unifies ASR + SSE + TTS for one turn and static quiz prompts.
Outer phase FSM wrapping LessonController; rules drive intro → interactive → reinforcement → done.
Wraps streamUserInput into an SSE ReadableStream for /api/chat.
One LLM turn: word-attempt judgment → history fetch → streamLLM → chunk drain → usage record.
Streaming JSON parser that emits 'speech' field value as it appears; emits delta on the fly.
Classroom memory: word hits, interest signals, turn history, per-card attempt judgment.
System prompt builder; includes learned-words summary and on-failure strategy switch.
MiMo client; streamLLM async-generates token delta and final usage.
Singleton mic + AudioContext + worklet module; prewarmRecorder primes mic at startLesson.
Queued 24kHz PCM player; stop() silences immediately.
16kHz Float32 → Int16 quantization, 200ms packets, supports flush of trailing partial buffer.
Visible regular courses; each has 12 word cards, 4 sentence cards, tone, phases, and quizzes.
Standard 10-course registry; exports allCourses / getCourseById.
Course / Card / Phase type definitions; phases is now required.
Top-level lesson UI; switches by currentPhase between Intro / Interactive / Reinforce / Done.
Theme intro: Mochi greeting plus locked word-card preview grid.
Interactive follow-read mandala; reuses LessonController ASR/TTS pipeline.
Reinforcement flow orchestration over pick-word / repeat-after-me quizzes; wrong retry speaks a static hint.
Quiz: speak prompt plus correct English word, lock PictureCard picks until playback finishes.
Quiz: speak targetText, then unlock repeat-after-me recording and local ASR scoring.
Lesson completion celebration with stars, counts, and CTAs.
Magic Academy home surface; renders all registry courses plus journal/parents CTAs.
Magic book progress view over /api/progress word-card snapshots.
Mochi parent PIN gate with local lockout.
Parent dashboard over stats and session APIs.
CC magic-academy atoms: Cat, PaperBg, Star, Sparkle, PaperButton, IllustrationSlot, PictureCard.
Numeric PIN pad.
Root error boundary; falls back to yard.
Document-level spacebar push-to-talk (filters e.repeat and input fields).
Progress aggregation (cross-lesson SUM attempts/correct, lastPracticed).
Stats aggregation for parents dashboard.
Client-side PIN hashing (SHA-256 + salt; 3-strike lockout 30s).
SQLite table definitions.
Query helpers used by /api/chat + aggregation routes.
DB handle factory; better-sqlite3 init.
POST /api/chat — start / message / end actions; SSE response.
GET /api/courses — returns the registered visible course catalog.
GET /api/progress — WordMastery snapshot for journal / done page.
GET /api/sessions — recent lessons list (default limit=10).
GET /api/stats — 7-day totals + mastery counts.
/ yard route; lists LetterCard courses.
Cabin route; mounts PhasedLessonView.
Grass route; sticker summary.
Storage route; mastered-word journal.
Attic route; PIN-gated stats dashboard.
Route-level fade-in wrapper; SceneFrame handles variant-specific transitions.
Lesson-report data layer: aggregates session + course + anomaly flags for /lesson-report.
pnpm run smoke — starts dev server + probes 5 pages + 4 APIs.
ASR hotwords regression harness.

lesson_controller.purpose: Single-turn voice orchestration: greeting → listen → think → speak → wait, plus static quiz speech.

states.name: awaiting
states.description: Ready for user to press spacebar.

states.name: thinking
states.description: Waiting for ASR final + LLM first token.

states.name: speaking
states.description: Streaming TTS audio to the user.

states.name: quiz-speaking
states.description: Playing deterministic reinforcement quiz prompt or retry hint through the existing TTS connection.

transitions.note: Must come from awaiting; barge-in from speaking is intentionally not supported.
Short-press guard — Doubao confidence too low under 1.5s.
Used only for deterministic reinforcement quiz prompts and retry hints; no /api/chat call.

phased_lesson_controller.purpose: Outer phase axis for three-phase lessons; LLM does NOT emit phase transitions — rules do.

states.name: intro
states.description: Theme introduction — opening greeting and card preview.

states.name: interactive
states.description: AI conversation; LessonController is active inside.

states.name: done
states.description: Lesson complete — go to grass summary.

transitions.note: Intro must not wait for every word card to be introduced.

transitions.on: clearedCardIds.size === cards.length OR totalAttempts >= 3×cards.length, then controller awaiting
transitions.note: Phase-change is emitted after phase-transition TTS finishes so the first quiz prompt cannot collide with transition speech.

data_flows.name: Enter lesson (opening monologue)
data_flows.description: PhasedLessonView mount → opening speech plays → user lands on awaiting.

steps.note: TTS handshake ~3.7s; prewarm primes getUserMedia + AudioContext + worklet so the first press has zero startup cost.

data_flows.name: Single conversation turn
data_flows.description: User holds spacebar → ASR → MiMo → SSE → TTS → playback complete.

steps.action: spacebar down (state=awaiting) → startListening; setState(listening); record listenStartedAt.
Upstream not ready yet → buffer pendingPcm.
Upstream open → send FullClientRequest (with corpus.context hotwords) → flush pendingPcm.
spacebar up: if recordedMs < 800ms emit '太短啦~' + state=awaiting; else flush worklet, asr.finish(), setState(thinking), arm 5s fallback.
On finish: if upstream ready send -seq, else mark pendingFinish; on final frame, forward JSON {type:'final', text}.
handleAsrFinal(text) → clear timer → asr.close → POST /api/chat {action:'message', sessionId, text, asrResult}.
Add raw ASR user message → streamLLM (MiMo) with prompt containing currentCardId / cardProgress / drillParts → SpeechExtractor → normalize show_card away from cleared or non-current cards → SSE.
Commit attempt_assessment + normalized show_card to cardProgress / clearedCardIds; record token_usage (LLM + ASR chars + TTS chars).
sendText (event=200) → upstream TTSResponse (event=352) → PcmPlayer.enqueue (drops if state moved back to listening/thinking).
On actions: pick last non-cleared show_card, including word or sentence_* cards → PictureCard switches card; progress counters remain word-card only.

data_flows.name: Reinforcement static TTS
data_flows.description: Quiz prompts are deterministic course data and reuse the long-lived TTS connection without an LLM turn.

steps.action: When entering reinforcement, await /api/chat?action=phase-transition TTS before emitting phase-change.
Mount ReinforcementFlow after the transition voice finishes.
speakStatic(text) requires state=awaiting, starts a TTS session, sets state=quiz-speaking, and resolves after SessionFinished.
QuizPickWordFrame speaks prompt + correct English word and locks PictureCard buttons until playback finishes.
ReinforceFrame speaks targetText and locks spacebar recording until playback finishes.
Wrong answers with retries remaining speak '再听一次: ...' before the next attempt.

data_flows.name: End lesson
data_flows.description: User taps end → tear down WS + audio + recorder; reset to idle.

design_decisions.choice: SpeechExtractor state machine parses a single LLM response.
design_decisions.rationale: Saves one LLM call and gives best first-token latency; ~100 lines.

design_decisions.choice: Fixed seed-tts-2.0-standard + Tina老师2.0 + caching.
design_decisions.rationale: Stability over expressive variance; opening / prompt sentences are 100% deterministic.

design_decisions.choice: Pipe LLM tokens straight into TTS.
design_decisions.rationale: Doubao docs recommend it for naturalness + emotion.

design_decisions.choice: Browser getUserMedia flags only.
design_decisions.rationale: Simple; no server-side DSP cost.

design_decisions.choice: Different lifecycles for ASR vs TTS sockets.
design_decisions.rationale: ASR needs a fresh session per utterance; TTS handshake costs ~3.7s and is worth amortizing.

design_decisions.choice: Do not close+new per turn.
design_decisions.rationale: Browser quotas: 3–5 rebuilds in a row brick the mic.

design_decisions.choice: Run getUserMedia + worklet on lesson start.
design_decisions.rationale: Otherwise startup costs ~300ms and the first few characters of the user's first sentence are lost.

design_decisions.topic: ASR proxy buffers PCM during handshake
design_decisions.choice: Queue PCM until upstream is ready.
design_decisions.rationale: Client WS opens in tens of ms but upstream handshake + full-client-request takes 1–3s; dropping during that window loses the user's first 1–3s.

design_decisions.choice: Flush <200ms tail on disconnect.
design_decisions.rationale: Otherwise the last word of the user's utterance gets dropped.

design_decisions.choice: Reject without entering thinking.
design_decisions.rationale: Doubao times out below ~1.5s; better to tell the user immediately than wait.

design_decisions.choice: 5s timeout to awaiting.
design_decisions.rationale: Faster failure feedback so users can retry.

design_decisions.choice: Ignore spacebar during speaking.
design_decisions.rationale: In-flight PCM is hard to fully clear; future work.

design_decisions.choice: Do not time-sync subtitle with audio.
design_decisions.rationale: Spec accepted at the time; canvas actions feel ~3s ahead of speech — see Known Issues.

design_decisions.choice: Exact English token match against current target.
design_decisions.rationale: Conservative; 'train' counts, 'tree' does not. No phonetic-similarity heuristics.

design_decisions.choice: Count requests + recognized text length (ASR) and speech chars (TTS).
design_decisions.rationale: Provider-native tokens not exposed; this still surfaces meaningful cost signal in lesson reports.
For young learners: image is the protagonist, text is the anchor.

design_decisions.choice: PhasedLessonController evaluates conditions; LLM does not emit phase transitions.
design_decisions.rationale: LLM-driven transitions are unpredictable; rules are testable and reversible.

design_decisions.choice: Quiz prompts and retry hints call LessonController.speakStatic over the existing TTS connection.
design_decisions.rationale: Reinforcement guidance is deterministic course data; no extra LLM turn or unpredictable wording is needed.

design_decisions.choice: Retire transportation / timeNumbers data and the old LessonView fallback.
design_decisions.rationale: Avoid maintaining two parallel course paths at user-count = 1.

design_decisions.choice: Reuse ASR/TTS/SSE pipeline rather than rewriting per phase.
design_decisions.rationale: Lower risk than rewriting the audio path.

metrics.name: user release → ASR final
metrics.note: Limit set by Doubao recognition itself once prewarm + buffer are in place.

metrics.name: ASR final → LLM first speech token
metrics.note: MiMo first-token is the bottleneck; front-end cannot fix.

metrics.name: LLM first token → TTS first PCM packet
Round-trip (release → AI finishes)
metrics.note: Includes AI speech duration; not a pure first-response metric.

performance_baseline.primary_bottleneck: MiMo first-token (~4s). Front-end optimization can recover only a few hundred ms.

known_issues.summary: sessions is a module-level in-memory Map: server restart / refresh / network drop invalidates the client sessionId. Client just shows '课程已过期'.
show_card actions lead AI speech; canvas feels ~3s ahead.
MiMo first-token ~4s dominates first-audio latency. Front-end cannot fix.

Doubao ASR weak on short English words and number normalization (e.g. 'hour' → 'Our.'). Dictionary fallback was removed because it overfit. LLM attempt_assessment now handles fuzzy mastery on raw ASR.
LLM message history trimmed to last 12 entries (~6 turns) but no summarization compression yet.
Tina老师2.0 is acceptable; finer auditions are future work.
No silence-based auto-stop; user must release spacebar (anti hold-without-releasing).
Single reconnect attempt; could add exponential backoff.
Doubao caches identical text — could be exploited for near-zero opening-line latency.

evolution.title: Voice pipeline v1 + sync docs
evolution.impact: README / TODO / benchmarks created alongside initial voice stack.

evolution.title: E2E acceptance bug fixes
evolution.impact: Multiple integration bugs corrected during initial acceptance; the architecture stabilized here.

evolution.title: Removed [bench] instrumentation + TODO refresh
evolution.impact: Once perf baseline captured, instrumentation pruned.

evolution.title: Redacted secrets from git history + added credential rule to CLAUDE.md
evolution.impact: Established the rotate → redact → force-push → rule playbook.

evolution.title: Canvas v2: WordCardCanvas replaces ImageCanvas
evolution.impact: Protocol unified to show_card; course data migrated from images[] to cards[]; ShowTool/FocusTool/AnnotateTool removed.

evolution.title: Teaching loop v1.1 — in-lesson progress engine + drillParts
evolution.impact: Every card requires drillParts; server uses show_card to sync currentCardId; LLM emits attempt_assessment; memory tracks cardProgress / clearedCardIds; history trimmed to 12.

evolution.title: Front-end refactor — Bunny's yard (5 spaces, 5 pages)
evolution.impact: Bunny upgraded to pose × mood full-body component; SceneFrame + LetterCard + WordBook + BloomButton + StickerWord; storage + attic added; client-side PIN gate; /api/{progress,sessions,stats}.

evolution.title: Three-phase lesson structure refactor
evolution.impact: Added food three-phase course + ImageGen PNG + structured scene.svg; phase-aware prompt / SSE progress_snapshot / phase-transition / quiz-answer; PhasedLessonController + Intro / Interactive / Reinforce / Quiz components; old courses + LessonView fallback retired; Course.phases is now required.

evolution.title: Course registry expansion
evolution.impact: Expanded visible catalog to 10 courses; regular course contract is 12 word cards + 4 sentence cards; repeat-after-me binds to sentence cards; word-card images are produced with Codex built-in image_gen and sentence cards reuse the target word image.

evolution.title: Reinforcement quiz static TTS guidance
evolution.impact: Added LessonController.speakStatic and quiz-speaking; pick-word and repeat-after-me prompts now play over TTS before unlocking UI, wrong retries play static hints, and reinforcement UI waits until transition TTS finishes.

doubao_tts_v3_pitfalls.rule: Lock codec flag to 0x04 (with event). Whether the frame carries sessionId is decided by event_id (<100 no; ≥100 yes; ConnectionStarted=50 carries connection_id). Do NOT swap flag based on 'is there a sessionId'.
req_params.additions is a JSON-encoded string, not an object. The Doubao table easily reads as object.
TaskRequest text lives in req_params.text, not at the top level. All synthesis params are nested under req_params.
One WebSocket may host multiple sessions, but only one at a time; never re-send StartConnection between sessions.

doubao_asr_v3_pitfalls.rule: show_utterances: true must be set, otherwise responses have no utterances array and final cannot be detected.
result_type: 'full', NOT 'single'. 'single' returns the current sentence only, leading words are lost.
enable_ddc: false for children — semantic smoothing drops repeated / hesitated words.
targetWords flow via WS query → proxy writes request.corpus.context = '{\"hotwords\":[...]}'. No per-word weight, no language_hint in current Doubao docs.

2026-05-05 regression: hotwords do not rescue 'hour → Our.' or '1000 → 10' style misrecognitions. The earlier dictionary-correction fallback was reverted because it overfit and hid raw ASR from the LLM. Real fuzziness is now handled by LLM attempt_assessment.
Client must NOT close the WS directly. Send {type:'finish'} so proxy can send -seq to upstream; close only after the final frame returns. Direct close strands the user in thinking forever.
Client WS opens in tens of ms but upstream handshake + full-client-request takes 1–3s. Proxy must queue PCM during that window or the first 1–3s of speech is lost.

auth_headers.note: Watch the App-Key vs App-Id one-letter difference; X-Api-Sequence: -1 is required for ASR.

mimo_api.auth: Authorization: Bearer (NOT api-key header, despite docs)
mimo_api.asr_legacy: mimo-v2.5 with input_audio content part (NOT /v1/audio/transcriptions) — currently superseded by Doubao
mimo_api.tts_legacy: mimo-v2.5-tts; base64 WAV in chat completion — currently superseded by Doubao

mastery_derivation.aggregation: buildProgressSnapshot SUMs across lessons; lastPracticed = MAX(start_time).

frontend.pin_gate: lib/pin.ts hashes PIN with SHA-256 + salt in localStorage; 3 failures locks for 30s; success resets counter.
frontend.reduced_motion: prefers-reduced-motion: reduce shortens all non-.bunny-motion animations to 0.01ms. Bunny mood animations preserved as semantic feedback.

lesson_report.data_layer: scripts/lesson-report-data.ts (pure function buildReport(db, sessionId, courseLoader) with unit tests)
lesson_report.scope: Engineering signals only (ASR misrecognition, conversational deadlocks, token usage, instrumentation). Pedagogy observations listed but not judged.

tooling.smoke: pnpm run smoke — starts dev server, probes 5 pages + 4 APIs.

directory_layout.src/components: React components grouped by surface (lesson, bunny, scene, journal, parents, ui, home, done).
directory_layout.src/lib: Pure logic + adapters (voice, agent, audio, db, mimo).

conventions.course_authoring: See .trellis/spec/frontend/course-authoring.md; every card needs drillParts; courses now must define phases.
conventions.commit_style: subject = type(scope): summary (e.g. fix(voice): ...); body = '-' bullets explaining substantive changes; Co-Authored-By footer required.
conventions.secrets_policy: Real credentials never appear in docs/commits/PRs even in private repos. Use placeholders. Leak playbook: rotate → git filter-repo --replace-text → force push → add a rule to CLAUDE.md.
